title: South African opposition figure Malema sentenced to five years in prison

title: Blunt-speaking Pope tells Cameroon to root out corruption to find peace
content: The pontiff was unusually forthright in his address at the presidential palace.

title: Wanted activist arrested in South Africa over support for Benin coup plot
content: Keba Seba is known for opposing French influence in Africa and backing West Africa's military leaders.

title: Legal migrants remain vulnerable to trafficking
content: Debt, employer control and temporary visa rules can leave migrant workers trapped.

title: Pope criticises 'tyrants' who spend billions on wars after Trump spat
content: The comments follow a high-profile spat with US President Donald Trump, who called the Pope weak on crime.

originalTitle: Turkish police detain 162 people over online praise for school shootings
title: Turkish police detain 162 people over online praise for school shootings
content: At least 16 people were injured in a shooting at a high school on Tuesday, before another nine were killed in a separate school shooting on Wednesday.

title: Ex-keeper Manninger dies after car hit by train
content: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Alex Manninger dies at the age of 48 after his car is struck by a train.

originalTitle: Bellingham says Camavinga red 'a joke' as Real fury grows
title: Bellingham says Camavinga red 'a joke' as Real fury grows
content: Real Madrid's Jude Bellingham says the decision to send off team-mate Eduardo Camavinga during their 4-3 Champions League loss to Bayern Munich was "a joke".

originalTitle: Fifa blamed for $100 World Cup trains from New York
title: Fifa blamed for $100 World Cup trains from New York
content: New Jersey Governor Mikie Sherrill accuses Fifa of failing to provide funding, which means fans must foot the bill for high transport costs at the World Cup this summer.
